underlying_goal: Debug and fix a production import job that was hanging on Lambda, then investigate and correct data integrity issues caused by the import
friction_detail: Claude tried to verify the fix on Lambda before the user had deployed it.
brief_summary: User needed to debug a production import hanging for 900+ seconds and fix resulting data integrity issues; Claude identified the MySQL query optimizer issue, implemented chunked queries reducing runtime from 700s to 0.34s, and reverted 7,902 misattributed records.
